reason: The tweet quotes Abu Musab al-Zarqawi, a former leader of Al-Qaeda in Iraq which later became ISIS, and praises extremist clerics associated with Al-Qaeda and ISIS.
taxonomy_labels: Politics and Current Events -> Extremism and Radical Ideologies
original_post: قالها الزرقاوي قبل ١٠ سنوات "ان امة تقنت على يوسف العييري وصالح العوفي وعبدالعزيز المقرن لامة سوء" رحمهم الله جميعا
